name: DoIP_GetReconnectDelay, DoIP_SetReconnectDelay
title: DoIP_GetReconnectDelay, DoIP_SetReconnectDelay
description: Sets or returns the delay started by the tester when the ECU closes the TCP connection. After the configured time the tester attempts at first to re-open the TCP connection and afterwards to re-establish the routing activation.

parameters.name: reconnectDelay_ms
parameters.description: Delay in milliseconds between TCP connection close and attempt to reactivate it. A value of 0 will deactivate this feature, i.e. the tester does not try to reactivate the route.
